note: crvUSD Controller mainnet markets (wstETH/sfrxETH/WBTC). 1 impl ABI -> 3 controllers (factory multi-address). 10 cover (create_loan / add_collateral x2 / remove_collateral x2 / borrow_more / repay x4) + 11 exclude (2 callback, 3 liquidate keeper, 6 admin).

0x23cfed03.name: create_loan(uint256,uint256,uint256)
0x23cfed03.reason: user create_loan on crvUSD Controller (lending) — Borrow/Supply/Withdraw/Repay, venue=crv_usd{controller,collateral}. create_loan/borrow_more modeled as Borrow (debt=crvUSD); the collateral token is named by the venue (the collateral DEPOSIT amount is a secondary effect, documented limitation).
